name: Lakh MIDI LoRA training

training_completes_no_oom.note: Lakh prep (download + filter + render to ~5,000 WAV pairs) not run; session-budget mismatch with full 17-item Phase G plus regression suite

discard_rationale: The strict criterion requires three measurements: train completion without OOM, test loss < 0.983, chroma sim >= 0.72. All three depend on a completed training run on Lakh, which requires 1-2 hours of corpus prep + 1-2 hours of training (~4 hour wall clock). This session's budget is exhausted by the 17-item Phase G plan plus the strict-measurement regression suite the user requested. The OOM protocol harness, dry-run log, and incident file are all in place; the training itself is queued as Phase H.
